reason: The remediation only edits /etc/security/pwquality.conf (or its .d fragments) to set the maxclassrepeat parameter. Adjusting this PAM password policy setting does not affect system boot, critical services, or authentication mechanisms in a way that would lock out users, making it a routine STIG hardening step.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; potential syntax error in pwquality.conf; setting may be left empty if variable is not defined
